title: Stir-Fried Dumplings
description: A simple and delicious stir-fry recipe with chewy dumplings, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: stir
ingredients.notes: mixed vegetables (e.g. bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat 1 cup of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add chewy dum and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until dum are cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
